0.title: Button to filter videos that were already seen
0.description: When we display all the videos of a channel, it would be nice to have a button that allows filtering to display only the videos that we haven't seen yet.

1.title: Splitting the videos and subs pages into two separate pages
1.description:
At the moment videomiam is just a single massive page, with all the code and scripts in a single page. 
I need to split this into several pages/script to make it easier to maintain

2.title: Add a new page for displaying a list of anime
2.description: Prepare a new page that can display a list of animes. The page can be mostly empty for now

3.title: Update the database schema to register animes
3.description:
Add a new table in the database schema to register Animes. Here are some of the fields necessary in this table: 
- id
- malId (MyAnimeList)
- Title
- Status (Completed, In progress...)
- Number of episodes
- Related Animes (prequels, sequels...)
- imageURL
- malURL
- synopsis
- genres

4.title: Add a button to add a new suggested anime
4.description: Add a button in the anime page to allow to enter an url/malID to insert into the database.

5.title: Display animes from the data
5.description: Read the content of the database, and populate the list of animes on the webpage.

6.title: Prevent auto update DB in dev
6.description: When I start main.js in dev mode, I don't want to automatically make queries to update the database. Maybe pass a --dev argument?

7.title: Retrieve data from MAL
7.description: Retrieve the information from MyAnimeList about an anime, and add the data into the database

8.title: Remove additional empty line when printing command
8.description: When we print a command, there is always an empty line between the command and its printed result.
8.cancelMessage: This task was submitted to the wrong project

9.title: Handle the requests to mark an anime as watched/not interested
9.description:
There are two buttons for each anime in the list, to indicate that the anime 
was already watched, or that we are not interested. Write the code to handle these requests

10.title: Fixing some styling issues
10.description: Should add some space between anime items

11.title: Fix style for items
11.description: Fix the style of anime items when there are too many genres

12.title: Show only the picture+title for already viewed animes
12.description: For animes that we've already seen, we should only display the title + picture. The width of the item should be much smaller as well.

13.title: Add an 'upcoming' section for animes that have not been released yet (or are currently airing)
13.description: Animes that we haven't seen and that are not completely released should go into a separate section in the Anime page. Same as animes already seen, only the title and picture should be displayed.

14.title: Transform anime title into a link to MAL pageg
14.description: Make it so that the anime title can be clicked and redirects to the MyAnimeList page

15.title: Update the status of the animes in the database
15.description: Add a method to update the status of the animes in the database by querying MAL.This method should be called once per month.

16.title: Add to the database animes related to viewed animes
16.description: When updating the anime database, we should add to the database the animes that are related to animes that were already viewed.

17.title: Proper API
17.description: Instead of dowloading the data and making the requests on the view, I should have a proper API for this website and handle the requests server-side. This is necessary to allow for multiple users.

18.title: Add support for multiple users
18.description: Need to look at how account creation could look like. I'm honestly not entirely sure.

19.title: Redesign the website
19.description: Create some low-fi prototype of what the new UI could look like, and how it could be improved.

20.title: Better support for adding channels
20.description: The way to add channels or playlist is very convoluted at the moment. We should be able to add them from their url instead.

21.title: Create config file
21.description: Create a config.yaml file and put sensitive informations (API keys and such) into it.

22.title: Put the anime part behind a feature flag
22.description: The anime part of the website should go behind a feature flag (I don't think I want it for the release version).

23.title: Support for different base urls
23.description: Support for specifying different base urls when hosting the website

24.title: Move to modules
24.description: Move the code to use modules and imports instead of require.

25.title: SMS notification in separate file
25.description: Put sms notifications in separate file, and use config file feature flag to enable/disable

26.title: Split backend routes into several files
26.description: Move the backend endpoints into several files depending on what they act on: videos, subscriptions or animes. Normalize the endpoint names to reflect this.

27.title: Code organisation
27.description: Modify how the code is organized to follow a standard architecture for a nodejs application

28.title: Add input validation
28.description: Add input validation on all the routes. Probably using express-validator

29.title: Add a test harness
29.description: Investigate how to add a test harness that can try out all the requests with various arguments and verify that the behavior is correct.

30.title: API request listing channels

34.description: When a request fails because you are not registered, we should redirect the user to the login page.

35.title: Add stylesheet for login and registration pages

37.title: Move list of subscriptions to user db
37.description: We should store in the user database which channel/playlist a user is subscribed to.

38.title: Expiration for cookies
38.description: The default storage for cookies (express-session) leaks memory I think. I need to provide a proper storage that does not have this issue.*

39.title: Merge the two databases
39.description: Keeping the two databases separate is going to be a pain to handle, so I'm going to merge them to simplify things.
